'''jozhashaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:spacial|spacial]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-zh-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:spacial|spacial]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| jozhashaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jozhashithi|jozhashithi]] || [[word:jozhashiji|jozhashiji]] || [[word:jozhashishi|jozhashishi]] || [[word:jozhashiki|jozhashiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jozhashuthuthu|jozhashuthuthu]] || [[word:jozhashujuju|jozhashujuju]] || [[word:jozhashushushu|jozhashushushu]] || [[word:jozhashukuku|jozhashukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jozhashuthu|jozhashuthu]] || [[word:jozhashuju|jozhashuju]] || [[word:jozhashushu|jozhashushu]] || [[word:jozhashuku|jozhashuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jozhashufthuf|jozhashufthuf]] || [[word:jozhashufjuf|jozhashufjuf]] || [[word:jozhashufshuf|jozhashufshuf]] || [[word:jozhashufkuf|jozhashufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jozhashethe|jozhashethe]] || [[word:jozhasheje|jozhasheje]] || [[word:jozhasheshe|jozhasheshe]] || [[word:jozhasheke|jozhasheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jozhashothotho|jozhashothotho]] || [[word:jozhashojojo|jozhashojojo]] || [[word:jozhashoshosho|jozhashoshosho]] || [[word:jozhashokoko|jozhashokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jozhashotho|jozhashotho]] || [[word:jozhashojo|jozhashojo]] || [[word:jozhashosho|jozhashosho]] || [[word:jozhashoko|jozhashoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jozhashofthof|jozhashofthof]] || [[word:jozhashofjof|jozhashofjof]] || [[word:jozhashofshof|jozhashofshof]] || [[word:jozhashofkof|jozhashofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:jozhashĂŻfthĂŻf|jozhashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:jozhashĂŻfjĂŻf|jozhashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:jozhashĂŻfshĂŻf|jozhashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:jozhashĂŻfkĂŻf|jozhashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:jozhashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|jozhashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:jozhashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|jozhashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:jozhashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|jozhashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:jozhashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|jozhashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:jozhashĂŻfthĂŻf|jozhashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:jozhashĂŻfjĂŻf|jozhashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:jozhashĂŻfshĂŻf|jozhashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:jozhashĂŻfkĂŻf|jozhashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:jozhashĂŻfthĂŻf|jozhashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:jozhashĂŻfjĂŻf|jozhashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:jozhashĂŻfshĂŻf|jozhashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:jozhashĂŻfkĂŻf|jozhashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jozhashĂŠthĂŠ|jozhashĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:jozhashĂŠjĂŠ|jozhashĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:jozhashĂŠshĂŠ|jozhashĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:jozhashĂŠkĂŠ|jozhashĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jozhashathatha|jozhashathatha]] || [[word:jozhashajaja|jozhashajaja]] || [[word:jozhashashasha|jozhashashasha]] || [[word:jozhashakaka|jozhashakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jozhashatha|jozhashatha]] || [[word:jozhashaja|jozhashaja]] || [[word:jozhashasha|jozhashasha]] || [[word:jozhashaka|jozhashaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jozhashafthaf|jozhashafthaf]] || [[word:jozhashafjaf|jozhashafjaf]] || [[word:jozhashafshaf|jozhashafshaf]] || [[word:jozhashafkaf|jozhashafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:jozhashasha|jozhashasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:jozhashĂ«sha|jozhashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jozhashrosha|jozhashrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jozhashmusha|jozhashmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:jozhashyasha|jozhashyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojozhashnkshĂ«sha|gojozhashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojozhashnkrosha|gojozhashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojozhashnkmusha|gojozhashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojozhashnkyasha|gojozhashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:jozhazhashasha|jozhazhashasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jozhazhashĂ«sha|jozhazhashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jozhazhashrosha|jozhazhashrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jozhazhashmusha|jozhazhashmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jozhazhashyasha|jozhazhashyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojozhazhashnkshĂ«sha|gojozhazhashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojozhazhashnkrosha|gojozhazhashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojozhazhashnkmusha|gojozhazhashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojozhazhashnkyasha|gojozhazhashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:jezhĂŠshasha|jezhĂŠshasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jezhĂŠshĂ«sha|jezhĂŠshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jezhĂŠshrosha|jezhĂŠshrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jezhĂŠshmusha|jezhĂŠshmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jezhĂŠshyasha|jezhĂŠshyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojezhĂŠshnkshĂ«sha|gojezhĂŠshnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojezhĂŠshnkrosha|gojezhĂŠshnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojezhĂŠshnkmusha|gojezhĂŠshnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojezhĂŠshnkyasha|gojezhĂŠshnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:jozhfashasha|jozhfashasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jozhfashĂ«sha|jozhfashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jozhfashrosha|jozhfashrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jozhfashmusha|jozhfashmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jozhfashyasha|jozhfashyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojozhfashnkshĂ«sha|gojozhfashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojozhfashnkrosha|gojozhfashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojozhfashnkmusha|gojozhfashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojozhfashnkyasha|gojozhfashnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
